modules.title: Introduction to SQL
modules.description: Get started with SQL: what it is, why it's useful, and how databases work.

topics.title: History and Purpose of SQL
topics.summary: Learn the origins and main uses of SQL in data management.
learningGoals: Identify the main purposes of SQL

topics.title: Databases Overview
topics.summary: Explore what databases are and how they store information.
learningGoals: Explain how data is organized in databases

topics.title: Relational Model Basics
topics.summary: Understand tables, rows, and columns in relational databases.

topics.title: SQL Environments and Tools
topics.summary: Discover common tools and environments for running SQL queries.
learningGoals: Understand how to access a database

modules.title: Reading Data from Tables
modules.description: Learn how to retrieve data from tables using SELECT statements.

topics.title: Basic SELECT Syntax
topics.summary: Understand the structure of a SELECT statement.

topics.title: Selecting Specific Columns
topics.summary: Learn how to retrieve only the columns you need.
learningGoals: Select specific columns from a table

topics.title: Selecting All Columns
topics.summary: Use the wildcard (*) to select all columns.

topics.title: Column Aliases
topics.summary: Rename columns in your output using aliases.
learningGoals: Apply aliases to columns in SELECT statements

modules.title: Filtering Results
modules.description: Master filtering data using WHERE clauses and logical operators.

topics.title: WHERE Clause Basics
topics.summary: Filter rows using the WHERE clause.
learningGoals: Write WHERE clauses to filter data

topics.title: Comparison Operators
topics.summary: Use =, <, >, <=, >=, <> to compare values.
learningGoals: Apply comparison operators in WHERE clauses

topics.title: Logical Operators (AND, OR, NOT)
topics.summary: Combine multiple conditions with logical operators.
learningGoals: Use AND, OR, NOT in WHERE clauses

topics.title: Filtering NULL Values
topics.summary: Handle missing data using IS NULL and IS NOT NULL.

modules.title: Sorting and Output Control
modules.description: Learn to sort results and limit the number of rows returned.

topics.title: ORDER BY Clause
topics.summary: Sort query results by one or more columns.

topics.title: Sorting Direction (ASC, DESC)
topics.summary: Control sort order with ASC and DESC keywords.
learningGoals: Sort results in ascending or descending order

topics.title: LIMIT and TOP Clauses
topics.summary: Restrict the number of rows returned.
learningGoals: Limit output using LIMIT or TOP

topics.title: OFFSET and Pagination
topics.summary: Skip rows and paginate results with OFFSET.

modules.title: Text Matching and Cleanup
modules.description: Work with text data: searching, matching, and cleaning up results.

topics.title: Pattern Matching with LIKE
topics.summary: Search for patterns in text using LIKE and wildcards.

topics.title: Case-Insensitive Matching
topics.summary: Perform case-insensitive searches with ILIKE or similar.

topics.title: String Functions (TRIM, UPPER, LOWER)
topics.summary: Clean and transform text data with string functions.
learningGoals: Use TRIM, UPPER, LOWER in queries

topics.title: Concatenating Text
topics.summary: Combine text fields using concatenation.

modules.title: Basic Aggregations
modules.description: Summarize data with aggregate functions like COUNT, SUM, AVG, MIN, and MAX.

topics.title: COUNT, SUM, AVG
topics.summary: Calculate totals and averages from data.
learningGoals: Use COUNT, SUM, and AVG functions

topics.title: MIN and MAX
topics.summary: Find minimum and maximum values in columns.

topics.title: GROUP BY Clause
topics.summary: Group data for aggregate calculations.

topics.title: HAVING Clause
topics.summary: Filter groups with HAVING after aggregation.

modules.title: Multi-Table Queries
modules.description: Combine data from multiple tables using JOINs.

topics.title: INNER JOIN
topics.summary: Retrieve matching rows from two tables.

topics.title: LEFT and RIGHT JOIN
topics.summary: Include unmatched rows with LEFT and RIGHT JOIN.

topics.title: CROSS JOIN
topics.summary: Combine all rows from two tables.

topics.title: Joining Multiple Tables
topics.summary: Join more than two tables in a single query.
learningGoals: Join multiple tables in one query

modules.title: Practical SQL Projects
modules.description: Apply your SQL skills to real-world scenarios and mini-projects.

topics.title: Querying a Sample Database
topics.summary: Practice querying a provided sample database.
learningGoals: Apply SELECT, WHERE, and JOINs in practice

topics.title: Data Cleanup Task
topics.summary: Use string functions and filtering to clean up data.
learningGoals: Clean and standardize data using SQL

topics.title: Aggregation Challenge
topics.summary: Summarize and analyze data using aggregate functions.

topics.title: Mini-Project: End-to-End Query
topics.summary: Combine all skills in a small project to answer business questions.
learningGoals: Integrate multiple SQL concepts in a project
